title: Writing Code
text: Writing Code Most editors in the Uniface IDE have a Write Script worksheet in which you can write ProcScript, and in some cases, JavaScript. In addition to the normal editing and navigation features available in the IDE, the Write Script worksheet provides facilities that are especially geared to editing and navigating script. Related Links Scripting Application Behavior Uniface enables you to script application behavior using ProcScript, Uniface's own scripting language, and JavaScript, the most widely-used scripting language for web applications.
